items.summaryZh: 日本石油驱动的进口激增扩大了贸易逆差，使日本央行持有黄金触及两周高位变得更加复杂，因为伊朗外交在美联储“暂停”会议之前点燃了火焰特朗普批准了30年的美沙核协议和铀浓缩选项黄金跳回4,100 $以上，充满活力！中国人民银行今天将美元/人民币中点设定为6.7933 （相对于

items.title: investingLive Americas FX news wrap 22 Jul. Middle east tensions keep markets on edge. Oil higher.
items.summary: US stock indices give up their gains and close lower on the day Alphabet beats Q2 estimates as cloud revenue surges and Gemini usage grows Tesla, Alphabet, ServiceNow, IBM, Texas Instruments all report after the close Iran broadens its threats as the rhetoric turns increasingly dangerous ECB expected to hold, but EURUSD is nearing a breaking point after…
items.summaryZh: 随着云收入激增，特斯拉、Alphabet、ServiceNow、IBM、德州仪器(Texas Instruments)的双子座(Gemini)使用量增长，美国股票指数在Alphabet超过第二季度预期的那一天放弃了涨幅并收盘走低。随着欧洲央行(ECB)预计将持有的言论变得越来越危险，伊朗收盘后，特斯拉、Alphabet、ServiceNow、IBM、德州仪器(Texas Instruments)都报告了威胁扩大，但欧元兑美元(EURUSD)
items.summaryEn: US stock indices give up their gains and close lower on the day Alphabet beats Q2 estimates as cloud revenue surges and Gemini usage grows Tesla, Alphabet, ServiceNow, IBM, Texas Instruments all report after the close Iran broadens its threats as the rhetoric turns increasingly dangerous ECB expected to hold, but EURUSD is nearing a breaking point after…

items.title: Japan's oil-driven import surge widens trade gap, complicates BOJ hold
items.summary: The scale of the import beat, more than 4 percentage points above forecast, reinforces the case that the BOJ will need to maintain its tightening bias even while holding rates next week, keeping USD/JPY intervention risk and rate differential trades in focus.
items.impactZh: 央行政策预期变化可能提升主要货币对波动，杠杆仓位的保证金与回撤压力上升。
items.impactEn: Shifts in central-bank expectations may increase major-pair volatility and raise margin/drawdown pressure on leveraged positions.
items.summaryZh: 进口节拍的规模比预测高出4个百分点以上，这强化了日本央行即使在下周维持利率时也需要保持其紧缩偏好的情况，从而使美元/日元干预风险和利率差异交易成为焦点。
items.summaryEn: The scale of the import beat, more than 4 percentage points above forecast, reinforces the case that the BOJ will need to maintain its tightening bias even while holding rates next week, keeping USD/JPY intervention risk and rate differential trades in focus.
